audit_items.proof_trace: childinfo.c contains zero heap allocation (malloc/calloc/zmalloc) and zero free() calls, confirmed by full-file grep; the universal quantifier 'forall free(p) in childinfo.c' holds vacuously over an empty set. All data in the file is either an embedded global struct (server.child_info_data) or integer file descriptors (server.child_info_pipe[2]); after closeChildInfoPipe() sets both fds to -1, sendChildInfo() and receiveChildInfo() each guard reuse with an immediate -1 sentinel check before any fd operation.
